Claude does the work
Claude works through each step, looping you in before
anything signiﬁcant. Watch in real time or walk away. For
recurring tasks, tell Claude once and it handles the rest.
You’re in control
You choose which folders and connectors Claude can
access. Before Claude acts, it shows you the plan and
waits for your approval. Redirect, reﬁne, or take a different
approach at any step./Claude Cowork Product Explore hereContact sales Try Claude
